body.title: Repoint embedder.py to the rack embeddings generator
body.intention: I intend that embeddings come from the rack embeddings generator, not a raw ollama.embeddings call in igor.
body.description:
**Akien (2026-06-29):** embedder is replaced by the embeddings generator in the rack. **File:** unseen_university/devices/igor/cognition/embedder.py:46 . **Task:** find the rack embeddings-generator device/tool and repoint embedder through it (the Proxy does chat, not embeddings — confirm whether the rack generator is a device call or a Proxy embeddings path). Preserve the on-disk cache. **Test:** grep embedder for / -> 0; embedding smoke via the rack.

Part of the igor Inference-Proxy-only sweep (post T-inf-reroute-A/B/C).

[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: SUPERSEDED by D-graph-tree-embeddings-teach-on-miss-2026-06-30 (esp. T-graph-embed-retire-nomic). The repoint reframed entirely: embeddings move to graph-tree node-activation (not a repoint to an existing rack service); nomic retires under that epic. No work shipped here.
body.unproven_reason: None — won't-do/superseded; the lever is a first-class superseded-close path that doesn't force proof-or-shipped-unproven.

description:

title: Repoint embedder.py to the rack embeddings generator
